svg.title: JWT Authentication flow
svg.desc: Shows register and login flows through controllers, bcrypt, JWT, and the protected route middleware

g.onclick: sendPrompt('What goes in the register request body?')
sendPrompt('What does the auth controller do on register?')
sendPrompt('How does bcrypt hash the password?')
sendPrompt('What does User.create save to MongoDB?')
sendPrompt('What does the register response return?')
sendPrompt('What goes in the login request body?')
sendPrompt('When is a JWT generated after login?')
sendPrompt('What does the login response return?')
sendPrompt('How does the Authorization header work?')
sendPrompt('What does the protect middleware do?')
